phase-plan.purpose: Define spatial dungeon data + visualization workflows to explore room/level layouts and content placement.
phase-plan.scope: Docs-site Dungeon Explorer; engine spatial fields already added. Focus on serialization, plotting, filters, and per-turn playback using one dungeon run.

file.description: Room and level transforms, sizes, and room-center helper.
Serialized dungeon content pack payload with room/item catalogs, transforms, and placement.
Deterministic generator for 12-level dungeon layout with 50 unique room and item archetypes.
Dungeon Explorer UI and plotting controls.

task.description: Define serialized dungeon layout payload (rooms, items, entities, transforms) for explorer.
Build interactive explorer view: level selector, room/feature filters, hover details.
Add agent playthrough track overlay (player + NPC path) for a single dungeon.
Generate and validate 12-level serialized dungeon with contiguous room placement, 50 unique rooms, and 50 unique items.
Support serialized per-level/per-room/per-item transforms in contracts and world-loader ingestion path.

decision.summary: Dungeon Explorer focuses on physical space and transforms, separate from content space PCA.
decision.impact: Clear boundary between spatial layout analysis and content vector analysis.
